function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.md, context) and used local account records to answer.
function.outcome_justification: contacts/mgr_002.json identifies the manager as Tanja Frank; accounts/acct_002.json, accounts/acct_005.json, and accounts/acct_008.json each have account_manager set to Tanja Frank. Their `name` fields were collected and alphabetically sorted.
